zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Coolidge於1678年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，她的父親John Coolidge II49歲，母親Hannah Livermore45歲。她於1696年10月14日與Nathan Fiske在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1723年11月27日在她的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可萊星頓笛卡爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Coolidge于1678年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，她的父亲John Coolidge II49岁，母亲Hannah Livermore45岁。她于1696年10月14日与Nathan Fiske在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1723年11月27日在她的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可萊星頓笛卡爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Coolidge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably an occupational name for acollege servant or someone with some other association with auniversity college, for example a tenant farmer who farmed one of themany farms in England known as College Farm, most of which are or wereowned by university colleges.

variants.name: Colledge
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): habitational name from Colwich in Staffordshire, named from Old English col ‘(char)coal’ + wīc ‘building’. The name has become associated with the familiar word college.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Coolidge was born on 27 June 1678, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Coolidge II, was 49 and her mother, Hannah Livermore, was 45. She married Nathan Fiske on 14 October 1696, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 27 November 1723, in her hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Old Burying Ground, Lexington, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Coolidge est née le 27 juin 1678, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Coolidge II, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Hannah Livermore, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Nathan Fiske le 14 octobre 1696, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1723, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Burying Ground, Lexington, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Coolidge am 27. Juni 1678 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Coolidge II 49 und ihre Mutter Hannah Livermore 45. Sie hat am 14. Oktober 1696 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Nathan Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. November 1723 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Burying Ground, Lexington, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Coolidge è nata il il 27 giugno 1678 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Coolidge II, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Hannah Livermore, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Nathan Fiske il 14 ottobre 1696, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 27 novembre 1723, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Burying Ground, Lexington, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Coolidgeが1678年6月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父John Coolidge IIは49歳，母Hannah Livermoreは45歳であった。1696年10月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでNathan Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1723年11月27日に故郷で45歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスレクシントンオルド ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Coolidge(이)가 1678년 6월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Coolidge II(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hannah Livermore(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1696년 10월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Nathan Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1723년 11월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 렉스잉턴 드 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Coolidge nasceu em 27 de junho de 1678, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Coolidge II, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Livermore, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathan Fiske em 14 de outubro de 1696, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1723, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Burying Ground, Lexington, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Coolidge родилась 27 июня 1678 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Coolidge II было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Livermore, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathan Fiske 14 октября 1696 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 27 ноября 1723 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности олд буринг гроунд, лексингтон, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Coolidge nació el 27 de junio de 1678, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Coolidge II, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Hannah Livermore, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Nathan Fiske el 14 de octubre de 1696, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1723, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Old Burying Ground, Lexington, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
